title: Senior Plant Manager at Siemens India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Siemens India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Siemens India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
